title: TurboQuant Explained..
summary: TurboQuant is a quantization technique from Google that reduces VRAM requirements and graphics card load by compressing KV cache and vectors using codebook-based methods. The approach optimizes for mean squared error and inner product error to maintain model performance while reducing memory footprint.
